command.ucs.about: Ultimate Claiming System is loaded. Claiming features will be added through the UCS roadmap.
command.ucs.archive.restore.failed: UCS could not restore that archive: %s
command.ucs.archive.restore.invalid_id: Archive id %s is not a valid UUID.
command.ucs.claim.denied.claim_too_large: That selection is larger than the per-claim limit (%s chunks).
command.ucs.claim.denied.overlap: That selection overlaps an existing claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.denied.payment_failed: UCS could not complete the economy transaction: %s
command.ucs.claim.denied.radius_too_larg: That radius is larger than the configured limit (%s).
command.ucs.claim.denied.save_failed: UCS could not save that claim: %s
command.ucs.claim.denied.too_many_chunks: That claim would exceed your total chunk limit (%s chunks).
command.ucs.claim.denied.too_many_claims: You have reached your active claim limit (%s claims).
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.ambiguous: Chunk %s touches multiple owned claims. Use /claim merge from inside one of them first.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.no_merge_t: No adjacent owned claims can be merged from %s.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.not_adjace: Chunk %s is not adjacent to one of your claims.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.not_owner: You do not own the claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.only_chunk: Cannot remove the only chunk in %s. Use an unclaim workflow when it is available.
command.ucs.claim.edit.denied.would_spli: Removing %s would split the claim. Use /claim split for a deliberate split.
command.ucs.claim.edit.split: Split claim into %s connected claims after removing chunk %s, %s.
command.ucs.claim.metadata.denied.invali: Claim description must be at most %s characters.
Claim name must be nonblank and at most %s characters.
command.ucs.claim.roles.denied.no_pendin: There is no pending invite for this claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.roles.denied.owner: Cannot change owner role membership for %s.
command.ucs.claim.roles.denied.role_not_: Role %s is not configured for claims.
command.ucs.claim.roles.denied.self: You cannot change your own role with this command.
command.ucs.claim.roles.untrusted: Removed %s from roles and invites in %s.
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.already_li: That claim is already listed for sale (%s).
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.buyer_limi: Buying this claim would exceed your claim limit (%s).
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.invalid_li: That listing id is not a valid UUID.
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.not_listed: That claim is not listed for sale (%s).
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.not_player: Only player-owned claims can be sold (%s).
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.price_too_: That sale price is above the configured cap (%s).
Sale price must be greater than zero.
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.self_purch: You cannot buy your own claim.
command.ucs.claim.sale.denied.stale: That sale listing changed. Current listing is %s.
command.ucs.claim.sale.listed: Listed %s for sale at %s. Listing id: %s
command.ucs.claim.lease.accepted: Accepted the lease for %s. Expires at %s.
command.ucs.claim.lease.cancelled: Cancelled the lease for %s. Lease id: %s
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.already_h: %s already has an open lease for this claim.
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.duration_: Lease duration must be at least one day.
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.invalid_l: That lease id is not a valid UUID.
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.no_lease: That lease does not exist or is already closed (%s).
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.not_offer: That lease is not an open offer (%s).
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.not_tenan: Only the lease tenant can accept or renew this lease.
command.ucs.claim.lease.denied.tenant_ow: The owner cannot be the tenant of their own claim.
command.ucs.claim.lease.expired: Expired the lease for %s. Lease id: %s
command.ucs.claim.lease.offered: Offered %s a lease on %s for %s over %s days as %s. Lease id: %s
command.ucs.claim.lease.renewed: Renewed the lease for %s. Expires at %s.
command.ucs.claim.bans.denied.cooldown: That player was expelled too recently.
command.ucs.claim.bans.denied.not_in_cla: That player is not inside this claim (%s).
command.ucs.claim.bans.entry_prevented: You are banned from this claim.
command.ucs.claim.bans.no_safe_location: UCS could not find a safe location outside this claim.
command.ucs.claim.service_unavailable: UCS claim storage is not ready yet.
command.ucs.claim.success.radius: Claimed %s chunks around chunk %s, %s in %s as %s.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.cancelled.mov: Claim teleport cancelled because you moved.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.denied.missin: The claim spawn dimension is not loaded: %s.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.denied.no_lon: The claim spawn is no longer inside its claim at %s.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.denied.no_own: You do not have an owned claim with a spawn set.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.denied.not_al: You are no longer allowed to use the claim spawn at %s.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.denied.unsafe: The claim spawn at %s is not safe.
command.ucs.claim.teleport.queued: Teleporting to %s in %s seconds. Do not move.
command.ucs.help.claim_add: /claim add - Add your current chunk to an adjacent claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_ban: /claim ban <player> - Ban an online player from the claim you are standing in.
command.ucs.help.claim_description: /claim description <text> - Set the description for the claim you are standing in.
command.ucs.help.claim_home: /claim home - Teleport to one of your claim spawns.
command.ucs.help.claim_invite: /claim invite accept|decline - Respond to a pending claim role invite at your current chunk.
command.ucs.help.claim_kick: /claim kick <player> - Move an online player to a safe location outside your claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_merge: /claim merge - Merge adjacent claims you own.
command.ucs.help.claim_name: /claim name <name> - Rename the claim you are standing in.
command.ucs.help.claim_radius: /claim <radius> - Claim a square radius around your current chunk.
command.ucs.help.claim_remove: /claim remove - Remove your current chunk when the claim stays connected.
command.ucs.help.claim_role: /claim role <player> <role> - Assign an online player to a configured claim role.
command.ucs.help.claim_sale: /claim sale <price> - List the claim you are standing in for sale.
command.ucs.help.claim_sale_buy: /claim sale buy [listingId] - Buy the listed claim you are standing in.
command.ucs.help.claim_sale_cancel: /claim sale cancel - Cancel the sale for your current claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_lease_accept: /claim lease accept <leaseId> - Accept and pay for a lease offered to you.
command.ucs.help.claim_lease_cancel: /claim lease cancel <leaseId> - Cancel an offered or active lease for your claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_lease_evict: /claim lease evict <leaseId> - Evict an active tenant and revoke the lease role grant.
command.ucs.help.claim_lease_offer: /claim lease offer <player> <price> <days> [role] - Offer paid tenant access to your claim.
command.ucs.help.claim_lease_renew: /claim lease renew <leaseId> - Pay again to extend your active lease by its original duration.
command.ucs.help.claim_setspawn: /claim setspawn - Set the spawn for the claim you are standing in.
command.ucs.help.claim_split: /claim split - Deliberately split a claim by removing your current chunk.
command.ucs.help.claim_trust: /claim trust <player> - Trust an online player with the default claim role.
command.ucs.help.claim_unban: /claim unban <player> - Remove the banned role from an online player.
command.ucs.help.claim_untrust: /claim untrust <player> - Remove an online player from claim roles and pending invites.
command.ucs.help.archive_list: /ucs archive list - List recent archived claims. Requires UCS archive restore permission.
command.ucs.help.archive_restore: /ucs archive restore <archiveId> - Restore an archived claim after validation.
command.ucs.help.bypass: /ucs bypass - Toggle temporary admin protection bypass.
command.ucs.help.debug: /ucs debug - Toggle temporary protection denial debug output.
command.ucs.help.permissions: /ucs permissions - Inspect UCS permission nodes. Requires UCS admin permission.
command.ucs.help.version: /ucs version - Show the loaded UCS version.
command.ucs.permission.denied: You do not have permission to use this UCS action (%s).
command.ucs.player_only: Only players can use this UCS command.
ucs.configuration.title: Ultimate Claiming System Config
ucs.configuration.warnAboutEconomyDefaul: Warn About Economy Defaults On First Run
